name: editor4c: dragging an image resize handle changes its dimensions
_note: Phase B — image resize gesture. Click the image to select it (resize overlay + 4 corner handles appear), then drag the SE handle by a relative dx/dy via mouse_drag. The editor's window mousemove/mouseup listeners resize the overlay and commit cmdResizeImage on mouseup → the img gains width & height attributes (it had none initially). Exercises coordinate hit-testing on a JS-created overlay handle end to end (§5.2 geometry).
